game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **RPG イノセントリベンジャー ～壁の乙女とミデンの塔～**: Players engage in turn-based "formation command battles" where they select actions for their party members from an on-screen menu, strategically positioning characters to maximize the effects of skills that impact adjacent allies. The unique "Wall Maiden" character, Mule, can integrate with environmental walls to provide defensive benefits or act as a barrier, influencing battle outcomes. Progression involves advancing through a narrative-driven tower, gaining experience points from battles to increase character levels up to a maximum of 999, and acquiring over 100 distinct passive skills by meeting specific in-game conditions or progressing through the story. Players can also transmute items by placing them into a kiln to discover new equipment or consumables, and the game features challenging post-game bosses for continued engagement after completing the main story.
game_info.description: Command your party through the mysterious Miden Tower in this tactical RPG! Battle enemies using turn-based formation combat where positioning matters. Your unique hero, Mule the Wall Maiden, can merge with walls for defense. Defeat enemies to gain experience, level up to 999, unlock over 100 passive skills, and transmute items in your kiln. Complete floors to progress through the tower and face the ultimate boss!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate menus, select party member/action/target
Space: Confirm selection in battle menu
Z: Cancel/go back in menus
Shift: Open transmutation menu (when available)
Enter: Start game from title screen
Esc: Pause/unpause game
R: Return to title screen

TEST_1.test_description: Basic gameplay validation test. Tests menu navigation, battle action selection, and basic combat mechanics to ensure the game functions correctly.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Navigate through menus using arrow keys and space to confirm actions. Select Attack actions for party members and target enemies. Validate that damage is dealt and turns progress correctly.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Successfully complete one full battle round with all party members taking actions. Health values update correctly, turn order advances, and no errors occur during combat flow.

TEST_2.test_description: Win condition validation test. Tests the complete game loop from battle to victory, level progression, and floor advancement to reach the final boss and win.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Defeat all enemies on each floor, gain experience points, level up characters, progress through all tower floors, defeat the final boss, and trigger the GAME_OVER_WIN state successfully.
TEST_2.description: Win condition validation test. Tests the complete game loop from battle to victory, level progression, and floor advancement to reach the final boss and win.

TEST_3.test_description: Transmutation system test. Validates the item transmutation mechanic where items are placed in the kiln to create new equipment and consumables.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Collect items from battle rewards. Open transmutation menu using Shift key. Select items to place in kiln. Wait for transmutation completion and verify new items are added to inventory.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Successfully transmute at least 3 different items. New equipment or consumables appear in inventory. Transmutation system functions without errors and integrates properly with the battle system.
